roots.description: Cannot transmit information faster than channel capacity C = B log2(1 + SNR).
Cannot simultaneously know position and momentum with arbitrary precision. Delta_x * Delta_p >= hbar/2.
No heat engine can exceed Carnot efficiency eta = 1 - T_cold/T_hot.

Any continuous self-map of a compact convex set must have a fixed point; it is impossible to continuously retract a disk onto its boundary | SOURCE: L.E.J. Brouwer, 1911. Uber Abbildung von Mannigfalt
Fourier series cannot converge to discontinuous function without permanent ~9% overshoot at jumps. L2 converges but L-infinity does not.
No bilateral trading mechanism can be simultaneously efficient, budget-balanced, and individually rational under private overlapping valuations.
A distributed system cannot simultaneously guarantee Consistency, Availability, and Partition tolerance.
